description: Time lab hardware inventory. Machine-readable resource list for Mayor scheduling of hardware-dependent work. See docs/hw-labels.md for the hw: bead label convention.

TimeHat.description: Raspberry Pi 5 with TimeHAT v5 — primary PePPAR Fix dev platform

oxco.description: x86 host with Intel E810 OCXO NIC and onboard F9T

TimeHAT-v5.description: TimeHAT v5 — i226 + TCXO on Pi 5 HAT

E810-XXVDA4T.description: Intel E810-XXVDA4T — OCXO, sub-ns timestamping, onboard F9T
E810-XXVDA4T.driver: ice (in-tree works for EXTS/PPS in; PPS out likely needs Intel out-of-tree driver)
board_notes: External SMA connectors are marked A (top) and B (bottom) on the bracket.
PCB silkscreen near the SMA connectors reads J13 and J14.
Nearby u.FL pair is marked RX/TX with TIME PULSE silk.
Nearby headers J21, J20, J9, and J34 remain undocumented in the lab notes.

SFN6322F-1.description: Solarflare SFN6322F #1 — 10G, PTP standard (no license needed)
SFN6322F-1.notes: PTP is standard — no license required

SFN6322F-2.description: Solarflare SFN6322F #2 — 10G, PTP standard (no license needed)
SFN6322F-2.notes: PTP is standard — no license required

SFN8522-1.description: Solarflare SFN8522 #1 — 10G, PTP license status unknown
SFN8522-1.notes: Needs AppFlex PTP license — run ethtool -T to verify

SFN8522-2.notes: Same as SFN8522-1 — license status unknown

SFN8522-3.notes: Same as SFN8522-1 — license status unknown

SFN8522-4.notes: Same as SFN8522-1 — license status unknown

F9T-3RD.description: u-blox ZED-F9T (EVK-F9T-20-00, ZED-F9T-20B) — primary GNSS receiver
F9T-3RD.notes: -20B variant: no GLONASS. Connected via USB.

E810-F9T.description: Onboard ZED-F9T on E810-XXVDA4T (via ice driver I2C)
E810-F9T.notes: Onboard receiver accessed via ice driver.

TICC-3.description: TAPR TICC #3 — time interval counter for validation

channels.chA: oxco E810 upper SMA (intended PHC PPS OUT; currently inactive with in-tree ice driver)
channels.chB: not yet documented after the 2026-03-22 move

TICC-3.reference: 10 MHz from SV1AFN distribution amp (fed by Geppetto GPSDO)
TICC-3.notes: Moved to oxco on 2026-03-22. Device appears as /dev/ticc3 on oxco via 99-timelab.rules. chA is wired to the E810 upper SMA. No live PPS seen yet because PPS out is not active on the current in-tree driver path.

wiring.signal: intended 1PPS (disciplined PHC output); currently inactive on in-tree ice driver
